financials.role: financial statement cross-check candidate; not valuation SSOT

overview.description: Cboe Global Markets, Inc., through its subsidiaries, operates as a derivatives and securities exchange network that delivers cutting-edge trading, clearing, and investment solutions in the United States and internationally. It operates through five segments: Options, North American Equities, Europe and Asia Pacific, Futures, and Global FX. The Options segment includes options on market indices, as well as on the stocks of individual corporations and on trading solutions and products in multiple asset classes, including equities, derivatives, an...
overview.financialIntro: In 2025, Cboe Global Markets's revenue was $4.71 billion, an increase of 15.13% compared to the previous year's $4.09 billion. Earnings were $1.09 billion, an increase of 43.86%.
overview.analystIntro: According to 17 analysts, the average rating for CBOE stock is "Hold." The 12-month stock price target is $319.64, which is an increase of 36.83% from the latest price.

data.title: VIX owner Cboe jumps into prediction markets to build on zero-day options growth

data.title: Cboe Global Markets Transcript: AGM 2026
data.text: The meeting featured strong financial results, strategic realignment toward core businesses, and decisive voting outcomes, with all board nominees and proposals (except the shareholder written consent proposal) approved by large margins. Innovation and global expansion remain key priorities.
